data.content:
# Implementation Plan â€” Bulk-tag selected beats + declutter multi-select bar

## Approach
The backend already supports this end-to-end: `updateBeatSchema` exposes
`labels` and `removeLabels` (src/lib/schemas.ts:63-64), and the bulk path
`handleBulkUpdate` -> `dispatchBulkUpdate` -> `updateBeatOrThrow`
(src/app/beats/use-bulk-actions.ts) forwards any non-terminal `UpdateBeatInput`
to every selected id unchanged. So this is purely UI: (a) add a tag/label
editor to the existing pending/Apply flow, and (b) collapse the four
always-visible "Set ..." Selects into ONE grouped "Edit fields" popover so the
bar stops horizontally scrolling. NO new API route, NO new schema field.

## Files
NEW:
- src/components/bulk/bulk-edit-shared.ts â€” move shared helpers/constants out of
  filter-bar so both filter-bar and the new bulk components import them:
  `formatLabel`, `commonTypes`, `collectPhaseStates`, `collectBulkSetStateOptions`,
  `QUEUE_STATES`, `ACTIVE_STATES`, `BULK_SET_STATE_OPTIONS`, the
  `MULTISELECT_*_CLASS` constants, and the `PendingBulkFields` / `PendingSetter`
  types. Extend `PendingBulkFields` with `labels?: string[]` and
  `removeLabels?: string[]`.
- src/components/bulk/bulk-labels-input.tsx â€” chip input: text Input + Enter to
  add a chip; chips render as Badge with an X to remove; trims input, rejects
  empty/whitespace-only, dedupes (case-sensitive match of existing pending).
  Two lists supported: labels-to-add and labels-to-remove (a small toggle or two
  sections), feeding `setPending`.
- src/components/bulk/bulk-edit-fields-popover.tsx â€” single Popover. Trigger is
  one "Edit fields" button (shows a count badge of how many fields are pending).
  Content stacks the four field Selects (Type/Priority/Profile/State) vertically
  + the BulkLabelsInput section + a footer with Apply (applies pending, closes,
  bumps resetKey) and a "Reset fields" affordance.
- src/components/bulk/bulk-edit-controls.tsx â€” move `BulkEditControls` and
  `BulkActionButtons` here. Bar now renders: "N selected", BulkActionButtons
  (Ship/Scene!/Merge/Refine Scope â€” stay directly visible), the single
  BulkEditFieldsPopover trigger, and Clear. Drop the inline 4-Select strip.

MODIFY:
- src/components/filter-bar.tsx â€” import shared helpers from bulk-edit-shared and
  `BulkEditControls` from bulk-edit-controls; `FilterBar` keeps delegating.
  `FilterControls` stays (it still uses QUEUE_STATES/ACTIVE_STATES via shared).
  This drops filter-bar back well under the 500-line max-lines budget.
- src/components/__tests__/bulk-edit-terminal-states.test.ts â€” update the import
  of `collectBulkSetStateOptions` to `../bulk/bulk-edit-shared`. Hermetic
  assertions unchanged.
- src/components/__manual_tests__/bulk-edit-terminal-states.test.ts â€” repoint the
  source-grep reads/slice from filter-bar.tsx to bulk-edit-controls.tsx (it
  asserts setPending/handleApply/resetKey/onBulkUpdate(fields) and slices between
  `export function BulkEditControls` and the next top-level fn). Manual suite is
  not in CI gates, but keep it accurate so test:manual stays green.

## Step-by-step
1. Create src/components/bulk/ dir; add bulk-edit-shared.ts by lifting the
   helpers/constants/types verbatim from filter-bar.tsx; extend PendingBulkFields
   with labels/removeLabels.
2. Build BulkLabelsInput (chip add/remove, validation, pending display).
3. Build BulkEditFieldsPopover wrapping the 4 existing Selects + BulkLabelsInput
   + Apply/Reset footer. Keep the existing pending/Apply/resetKey pattern; each
   field's onValueChange calls only setPending (preserves the manual-test
   contract that Selects never call onBulkUpdate directly).
4. Update `hasPending` and `handleApply` to include labels/removeLabels:
   `if (pending.labels?.length) fields.labels = pending.labels;`
   `if (pending.removeLabels?.length) fields.removeLabels = pending.removeLabels;`
5. Move BulkEditControls/BulkActionButtons into bulk-edit-controls.tsx; render the
   popover instead of the 4 inline Selects; remove `overflow-x-auto` from the bar
   container (or keep but verify it no longer triggers). Use flex-wrap as a
   defensive fallback so nothing clips below 768px.
6. Slim filter-bar.tsx to import-and-delegate; fix the two test files' imports.
7. Run gates.

## Constraint compliance
- State classification stays loom-derived: BULK_SET_STATE_OPTIONS continues to
  come from `collectBulkSetStateOptions` (builtin descriptors); Ship keeps its
  existing documented named-action comment for "shipped". No NEW hardcoded state
  strings (CLAUDE.md "State Classification Is Loom-Derived").
- Fail loudly: reuse the existing throwing `collectPhaseStates` /
  `collectBulkSetStateOptions`; add no `?? "default"` coalescing. Labels apply via
  the existing mutation whose errors already toast (CLAUDE.md "Fail Loudly").
- Reuse existing onBulkUpdate({ labels })/{ removeLabels }; no new route/schema.
- Code style: every new file < 500 lines, every fn < 100 lines, <= 100 cols;
  the split keeps filter-bar.tsx under max-lines (was ~520 raw).
- Header select-all stays page-scoped (beat-column-defs.tsx) â€” untouched.

## Test strategy
- Hermetic: keep collectBulkSetStateOptions descriptor test; add a small pure
  unit test for the label-normalization helper (trim/reject-empty/dedupe) in
  src/components/bulk/__tests__/.
- Manual grep test repointed to the new file; not a CI gate.
- Gates: bun install --frozen-lockfile, then bun run lint && bunx tsc --noEmit
  && bun run test && bun run build.
- Manual UI verify per knot steps 2-5 (3 queued beats, add two labels, Apply,
  confirm via beat detail + `kno ls --json`; check 1280px and 768px widths).

## Risks
- Popover inside an overflow strip can clip; mitigated by removing overflow-x-auto
  and/or rendering via PopoverPortal (PopoverContent already portals).
- Moving collectBulkSetStateOptions breaks the test import â€” handled in step 6.
- Radix Select inside Popover focus/scroll quirks â€” keep Selects as-is (already
  used in this bar) to avoid regressions.

## Complexity: Medium. Single cohesive UI change; no child knots required.
